name: B&C Speakers S.p.A.
summary: B&C Speakers S.p.A. manufactures and sells electro-acoustic transducer. It offers high frequency drivers and horns, coaxial components, and cone drivers, as well as LF and HF drivers, tweeters, and line arrays. The company provides its products under the B&C brand name, as well as supplies OEM components to professional audio brands in the market. It has operations in Italy and internationally. The company was formerly known as BBC Speakers SpA and changed its name to B&C Speakers S.p.A. in 1993. B&C Speakers S.p.A. was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Bagno a Ripoli, Italy. B&C Speakers S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Research & Development International S.r.L.
